hypothesis.text: Cache hit tokens cost approximately 10% of full input token price on Anthropic

query.text: Anthropic Claude prompt caching token cost pricing per million tokens

hit.title: Prompt caching - Anthropic
hit.snippet: Cache reads cost 10% of the base input token price. Cache writes cost 125% of the base input token price.

snapshot.summary: Official Anthropic documentation confirms that cached prompt reads cost exactly 10% of the base input token price, directly supporting the cost-reduction statistic.
